arts.ttl: Player working for “best season of career” after Southampton exit
arts.sum: At the end of last season, Che Adams left Southampton as a free agent, after spending five years at St Mary’s. The Scotland international decided to leave the UK for the first time in his career by making a switch to Torino. arts.ttl: “Will win the league then” – Tottenham legend says Arsenal need to sign Newcastle United star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur legend Les Ferdinand believes if Arsenal had Newcastle United’s Alexander Isak they would win the Premier League title. The Sweden international has been in impressive form for the Magpies this season and is currently seen by many as the No.1 centre-forward in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Newcastle United to release PSR funds after Mike Ashley clanger and Callum Wilson injury lifeline
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans discovered this week that the club are about to announce a revenue pile of around £314million when the next set of accounts are released. And while Newcastle may well still be some way behind some of the big guns like Man City, who made £715m in commercial gains and off field prize money, or Real Madrid who hit a cool €1.1billion in revenue this week according to the 2023/24 Deloitte Football Money League, the future looks bright on Tyneside.

arts.ttl: “Feels absolutely fantastic” – Player wants long term transfer to Southampton and to save them from relegation
arts.sum: New Southampton signing Albert Grønbæk has labelled his move to the club as ‘absolutely fantastic’, insisting he wants to make it permanent after saving them from relegation. Grønbæk has been speaking to Tipsbladet about his move to the south coast and the Premier League’s current bottom side. arts.ttl: Newcastle United stage internal inquest after 'sloppy' display as key man speaks out
arts.sum: But since then Newcastle stars have been shown the error of their ways with Howe saying: "Without repeating myself it was definitely linked to our physical feeling, so I’d love to see that change. The 6ft 7in Blyth defender admitted that the Magpies were "sloppy" in the 4-1 defeat against AFC Bournemouth and feels that even he got carried away after Newcastle stormed to nine consecutive victories to equal a club record.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have drastic January transfer loophole after Man City's £125m shopping spree
arts.sum: When asked if the rules seemed fair given City's busy week in the market, Howe told Chronicle Live: "My big thing is that there is an 'incentive' to sell Academy players. "When you put all that effort in, guide them through various age groups and the work the coaches at the centre of the Academy invest that time, then they are the players with the most incentive to sell - I don't agree with that.

arts.ttl: Why Newcastle United can't spend Marc Guehi transfer pot amid 'extraordinary' £33.6m blow
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has admitted that Newcastle United are seeing 'targets' move to other clubs after Abdukodir Khusanov joined Manchester City. Howe, wary of staleness setting in, has always set out to bring in at least one signing each window to lift the group and increase competition for places and Khusanov was a player Newcastle certainly liked.
